about.heading: Al Hamra CI for Insulation & Construction Materials
about.intro1: Our company was established to serve the construction sector in Kuwait and the GCC, providing integrated solutions in waterproofing, thermal, and acoustic insulation. about.intro2: Our team comprises skilled technicians and engineers specialized in insulation works, trained on the latest global technologies and materials. We use high-quality materials and adhere to safety and quality standards in every project.

about.missionDesc: To provide integrated and reliable insulation solutions that meet our clients' needs, with commitment to quality, transparency, and post-execution service.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Integrated solutions in waterproofing, thermal, and acoustic insulation with the highest quality standards

basement.title: Basement & Cellar Insulation
basement.desc: We provide integrated solutions for insulating basements and cellars from moisture and water leaks. We use high-quality, waterproof materials that ensure long-term building protection.

roofs.title: Roof, Annex, Bathroom & Kitchen Insulation
roofs.desc: Comprehensive insulation for roofs, annexes, bathrooms, and kitchens for protection from heat and moisture. We maintain building comfort and reduce energy consumption.

pools.title: Swimming Pool & Garden Insulation
pools.desc: Professional insulation for swimming pools and gardens to prevent leaks and ensure continuous operation. We use specialized materials resistant to water and chlorine.

tanks.title: Water Tank & Garden Insulation
tanks.desc: Protecting water tanks and gardens from leaks and corrosion with specialized insulation materials. We ensure water safety and structure protection.

acDucts.title: AC & Duct Insulation
acDucts.desc: Insulating air conditioning and ventilation systems (AC units and ducts) to improve efficiency and reduce energy consumption. We use high-quality thermal insulation materials.

acoustic.title: Acoustic Insulation
acoustic.desc: Acoustic insulation solutions for buildings and rooms to achieve comfort and tranquility. We offer suitable solutions for homes, offices, and mosques.
